label: Rugcheck token (Solana)
description: Headless Following automation pipeline: fetches api.rugcheck.xyz v1 report for a mint. If **max score normalised** is set, automation is blocked when score_normalised exceeds it (higher = riskier on Rugcheck). Tab runs perform the same fetch for testing.

formSchema.label: Mint (base58)
formSchema.placeholder: Leave empty to use swap base mint in SW
